message: Let's aim for a fair price around 50-60 to benefit both of us.
I will ask 60 each round. Will you bid 60?
I may bid less than 60 this time. Suggest you lower your ask to ensure trade.
I will keep asking 60 each round. Bid 60 to trade; otherwise no deal.
I'll ask 60 again this round and every round. Bid 60 to keep trading; otherwise no deal.
I am bidding 55 now. Ask 55 if you want to trade.
I am bidding 55. Ask 55 to trade or no deal.
I'll ask 55 this round to trade, but only if you promise to bid 60 for the next two rounds; otherwise I'll keep asking 60 and no trade.
I am bidding 55. Ask 55 to trade.
I'll ask 55 this round if you promise to bid 60 for the next two rounds; otherwise I'll ask 60 and no trade.
If you promise to bid 60 for the next 5 rounds, I'll ask 55 this round as a show of good faith. Otherwise I'll keep asking 60 and no deal if you bid 55.
I promise to bid 60 for the next 5 rounds. Ask 55 this round.
I'll ask 60 each round. Bid 60 to trade; otherwise no deal.
I will bid 60 only if you ask 55. Otherwise, I will bid 55.
I will bid 59 only if you ask 55. Otherwise, I bid 55. Trade at 57 or no deal.
I'll ask 55 this round if you promise to bid 60 for the next 6 rounds; otherwise I'll ask 60 every round.
I'll ask 60 every round. Ask 55 only if you promise to bid 60 for the next six rounds; otherwise I'll stick to 60 and won't accept 55.
I promise to bid 60 for the next six rounds. Ask 55 this round.
I will bid 60 this round if you ask 55. I promise to bid 60 for the next 6 rounds.
I'll ask 60 this round and every round. Bid 60 to trade; otherwise no deal.
I'll ask 60 this round and every remaining round. Bid 60 to trade; otherwise no deal.
I am bidding 55 this round and for all future rounds unless you ask 55. Then I will bid 60. Your choice: trade at 57-58 or no trade.
I'll ask 60 every round. Bid 60 to trade; otherwise no deal.
I bid 55 every round. Ask 55 to trade or no deal.
I will bid 55 this round. If you ask 55, we trade at 55. If you ask 60, no trade.
I'll ask 55 this round if you promise to bid 60 for the next 5 rounds; otherwise I'll ask 60 every round.
I promise to bid 60 for the next 5 rounds. Please ask 55 this round.
I'll ask 60 every round. Bid 60 to trade; otherwise no deal.
I will bid 55 this round unless you ask 55. If you ask 55, I bid 60.
I'll ask 60 this round and every round. Bid 60 to trade; otherwise no deal.
I'll ask 60 this round and every remaining round. Bid 60 to trade; otherwise no deal.
I will bid 60 for all remaining rounds.
I'll ask 60 every remaining round. Bid 60 to trade; otherwise no deal.
I will bid 60 for all remaining rounds. Let's trade.
I'll ask 60 every remaining round. Bid 60 to trade; otherwise no deal.
I will bid 60 for the remaining rounds.

I bid 60.
